Uses of Class
client.net.ClientConnection

Packages that use ClientConnection
Package
Description
client.app
Client-side application scaffolding: screen navigation and the in-memory session.
client.service
Client service layer: a typed facade over the raw connection.

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private ClientConnection
    Session.connection
    The active server connection, or null before connecting.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ClientConnection
    Session.getConnection()
    Returns the active connection, or null if not connected.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Session.login(ClientConnection conn, String host, int port)
    Promotes a freshly probed connection into the session (connection screen).

    Description
